evals.prompt: Add a new service to the services page for 'Logistics & Warehousing'. Use a truck icon and describe it as 'Comprehensive industrial logistics solutions across the UAE.' Ensure it matches the premium card style.
evals.expected_output: A new .premium-card at the end of the grid in services.html with the correct icon and text, matching existing styles.

evals.prompt: Change the primary accent color of the website from the current light blue to a more vibrant cyan (#00F2FF) in the CSS variables. Update all gradients to reflect this change.
evals.expected_output: CSS variable --primary-alt updated in style.css, and gradients in .btn-primary and .text-gradient updated accordingly.
